items.titleZh: 炎症的十字路口：家族性地中海热与心血管风险
items.abstractZh: 家族性地中海热（FMF）与心血管疾病（CVD）之间的关系尚不清楚。本研究旨在探讨FMF与CVD之间的关联。基于一项针对FMF患者的调查，被诊断为冠状动脉疾病、脑血管疾病和高血压的患者被视为CVD患者。在522名患者中，201人患有CVD。无CVD患者的平均年龄±标准差（SD）为53.00±6.43岁，有CVD患者为57.60±8.33岁。188名患者（36%）患有高血压，51名患者（9.8%）患有冠状动脉疾病，10名患者（1.9%）患有脑血管疾病。在CVD患者中，糖尿病（30.3%）是最常见的合并症。所有患者均服用秋水仙碱。35名CVD患者（17.2%）和25名非CVD患者（7.8%）存在秋水仙碱耐药。90%的患者继续接受秋水仙碱治疗。25名CVD患者（12.4%）和18名非CVD患者（5.7%）正在使用生物制剂（p=0.006）。发作期平均C反应蛋白（CRP）水平为61.3（SD=53.1），而缓解期平均值为3.39（SD=4.28）。CVD组发作期CRP中位数为3.00（3.65），非CVD组为2.00（2.5）（p=0.011）。高血压患者CRP中位数为2.8（3.55），非高血压患者为2.00（2.7）。FMF似乎不增加CVD风险。秋水仙碱耐药与心血管疾病的发生相关。秋水仙碱和抗白细胞介素-1在降低FMF患者心血管疾病风险方面显示出前景。

items.title: Real-World Effectiveness of Baricitinib in Rheumatoid Arthritis: Significant Reduction of Disease Activity Independent of Age in a Multicentre Retrospective Cohort Study.
items.abstract: To evaluate the real-world effectiveness of baricitinib (BARI) in rheumatoid arthritis (RA), compare outcomes in patients <65 years versus ≥65 years, and identify predictors of DAS28-ESR remission/low disease activity (LDA) at 6 and 12 months. Retrospective multicentre cohort (n=423). Baseline variables included age, sex, disease duration, and comorbidities. DAS28-ESR was recorded at baseline, 6 and 12 months; remission was defined as DAS28-ESR <2.6 and LDA as ≤3.2. Predictors of remission/LDA were assessed with multivariable logistic regression, reporting odds ratios (ORs), 95% confidence intervals (CIs), and p-values. Median age was 60 years (IQR 50.5-69.5); 79% were female; median disease duration 76 months (IQR 31-157). Compared with patients <65, those ≥65 had longer disease duration (94 vs 65 months; p<0.05) and more diabetes (16% vs 5%), dyslipidaemia (47% vs 19%), and hypertension (62% vs 33%) (all p<0.05). Median DAS28-ESR fell from 5.42 (IQR 4.84-6.06) at baseline to 3.71 (2.83-4.59) at 6 months and 3.29 (2.42-4.19) at 12 months (global repeated-measures test significant). Remission+LDA was achieved by 135/421 (32.1%) at 6 months and 182/423 (43.0%) at 12 months; remission alone increased from 65/421 (15.4%) to 117/423 (27.7%). Age ≥65 was not associated with response (6 months: OR 0.71, 95% CI 0.44-1.14, p=0.16; 12 months: OR 0.83, 95% CI 0.55-1.24, p=0.37). ACPA positivity independently predicted remission/LDA (6 months: OR 2.32, 95% CI 1.43-3.77, p<0.05; 12 months: OR 1.71, 95% CI 1.12-2.59, p<0.05). Prior JAK inhibitor exposure was not associated with reduced response. Results were consistent in a per-protocol sensitivity analysis. In this large multicentre real-world cohort, BARI significantly reduced disease activity over 12 months, with comparable effectiveness across age groups. ACPA positivity emerged as an independent predictor of achieving remission/LDA, supporting its potential role in treatment stratification.

items.titleZh: 巴瑞替尼在类风湿关节炎中的真实世界有效性：一项多中心回顾性队列研究中疾病活动度显著降低且不受年龄影响
items.abstractZh: 评估巴瑞替尼（BARI）在类风湿关节炎（RA）中的真实世界有效性，比较<65岁与≥65岁患者的结局，并确定6个月和12个月时DAS28-ESR缓解/低疾病活动度（LDA）的预测因素。回顾性多中心队列（n=423）。基线变量包括年龄、性别、病程和合并症。记录基线、6个月和12个月的DAS28-ESR；缓解定义为DAS28-ESR <2.6，LDA定义为≤3.2。采用多变量逻辑回归评估缓解/LDA的预测因素，报告比值比（OR）、95%置信区间（CI）和p值。中位年龄60岁（IQR 50.5-69.5）；79%为女性；中位病程76个月（IQR 31-157）。与<65岁患者相比，≥65岁患者病程更长（94 vs 65个月；p<0.05），糖尿病（16% vs 5%）、血脂异常（47% vs 19%）和高血压（62% vs 33%）更多（均p<0.05）。中位DAS28-ESR从基线的5.42（IQR 4.84-6.06）降至6个月的3.71（2.83-4.59）和12个月的3.29（2.42-4.19）（全局重复测量检验显著）。6个月时135/421（32.1%）达到缓解+LDA，12个月时182/423（43.0%）；仅缓解率从65/421（15.4%）增至117/423（27.7%）。年龄≥65岁与应答无关（6个月：OR 0.71，95% CI 0.44-1.14，p=0.16；12个月：OR 0.83，95% CI 0.55-1.24，p=0.37）。ACPA阳性独立预测缓解/LDA（6个月：OR 2.32，95% CI 1.43-3.77，p<0.05；12个月：OR 1.71，95% CI 1.12-2.59，p<0.05）。既往JAK抑制剂暴露与应答降低无关。结果在符合方案敏感性分析中一致。在这个大型多中心真实世界队列中，BARI在12个月内显著降低疾病活动度，且各年龄组疗效相当。ACPA阳性成为实现缓解/LDA的独立预测因素，支持其在治疗分层中的潜在作用。

items.title: Retinal Vaso-Occlusive Complications Associated with Systemic Lupus Erythematosus: A Systematic Review of Clinical Presentation and Visual Outcomes.
items.abstract: Ophthalmic involvement in systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE), particularly retinal vascular diseases, remains under-recognised despite its potential to cause severe visual impairment. This systematic review aims to evaluate the clinical presentation, pathophysiology, and treatment outcomes of retinal vascular diseases associated with SLE. A comprehensive literature search was conducted across PubMed/MEDLINE, ScienceDirect, Cochrane and Google Scholar using a combination of relevant MeSH terms. Data were extracted independently and quality assessment was conducted using the Joanna Briggs Institute Critical Appraisal Tool. A total of 35 studies, corresponding to 39 patients, were included in quantitative synthesis. Mean age of patients was 27.8±12.9 years. Most patients were from India (n=10; 25%) and the USA (n=8; 20%), with a majority being female (n=31; 79.5%). Unilateral visual disturbances were reported in 25 (64%) cases while 14 (36%) patients showed bilateral symptoms. Disease was sudden in onset in 23 (59%) and followed a progressive course in 16 (41%) patients. Common findings included Central Retinal Artery Occlusion (CRAO) n 24 patients (61.5%) and Central Retinal Vein Occlusion (CRVO) in 22 patients (56.4%). 36 patients (92%) were treated with steroids but only 25% responded positively, necessitating the use of immunosuppressants in 24 (61.5%) and anticoagulants in 16 (41%) patients. Among the 38 patients where outcomes were reported, only 2 (5%) achieved complete recovery, 14 (37%) showed partial recovery, and 20 (52.6%) showed no improvement. Retinal vascular involvement in SLE is rare but associated with significant visual morbidity. Early diagnosis and combined immunosuppressive therapy may improve outcomes. Further research is required to stan-dardise treatment protocols.

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮相关视网膜血管闭塞性并发症：临床表现与视力结局的系统评价
items.abstractZh: 系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）的眼部受累，特别是视网膜血管疾病，尽管可能导致严重视力损害，但仍未得到充分认识。本系统评价旨在评估SLE相关视网膜血管疾病的临床表现、病理生理学及治疗结局。在PubMed/MEDLINE、ScienceDirect、Cochrane和Google Scholar中，使用相关MeSH术语组合进行了全面的文献检索。独立提取数据，并使用乔安娜·布里格斯研究所关键评估工具进行质量评估。定量综合共纳入35项研究，对应39例患者。患者平均年龄为27.8±12.9岁。大多数患者来自印度（n=10；25%）和美国（USA）（n=8；20%），其中女性占多数（n=31；79.5%）。25例（64%）报告单侧视力障碍，14例（36%）患者表现为双侧症状。23例（59%）疾病突然发作，16例（41%）患者呈进行性病程。常见表现包括24例（61.5%）患者的视网膜中央动脉阻塞（CRAO）和22例（56.4%）患者的视网膜中央静脉阻塞（CRVO）。36例（92%）患者接受类固醇治疗，但仅25%反应良好，因此24例（61.5%）需要使用免疫抑制剂，16例（41%）需要使用抗凝剂。在报告结局的38例患者中，仅2例（5%）完全恢复，14例（37%）部分恢复，20例（52.6%）无改善。SLE的视网膜血管受累罕见，但与显著的视力病残相关。早期诊断和联合免疫抑制治疗可能改善结局。需要进一步研究以标准化治疗方案。

items.title: Phenotypic Heterogeneity in Familial Takayasu Arteritis Across Two Families: A Case-Based Review.
items.abstract: Takayasu arteritis (TAK) is a rare large-vessel vasculitis that predominantly affects young women. Familial cases are uncommon but suggest a possible genetic predisposition. We describe five familial TAK cases from two families. In the first, two sisters had distinct disease patterns: one with severe supra-aortic involvement (Hata IIa), requiring intensive immunosuppression and vascular interventions; the other with isolated abdominal aortic disease (Hata IV), successfully managed with standard therapy. In the second family, three siblings presented with varying severity. One sister had mild disease responsive to therapy, whereas another developed rapidly progressive TAK with multivessel involvement, necessitating complex surgical management and ultimately succumbing to COVID-19 complications. Their brother presented with extensive Hata V involvement and achieved remission following brief medical therapy. Familial TAK demonstrates marked clinical and radiological heterogeneity, even among first-degree relatives. These findings underscore the importance of clinical vigilance and prompt evaluation for relatives who develop suggestive symptoms, to enable timely diagnosis and improve clinical outcomes.

items.titleZh: 两个家族中家族性大动脉炎的表型异质性：基于病例的综述
items.abstractZh: 大动脉炎（TAK）是一种罕见的大血管血管炎，主要影响年轻女性。家族性病例不常见，但提示可能存在遗传易感性。我们描述了两个家族中的五例家族性TAK病例。在第一个家族中，两姐妹表现出不同的疾病模式：一例有严重的主动脉上分支受累（Hata IIa），需要强化免疫抑制和血管介入治疗；另一例为孤立的腹主动脉疾病（Hata IV），通过标准治疗成功控制。在第二个家族中，三兄妹表现出不同的严重程度。一姐妹对治疗反应良好，病情较轻，而另一姐妹发展为快速进展性TAK伴多血管受累，需要复杂的外科处理，最终死于COVID-19并发症。其兄弟表现为广泛的Hata V受累，在短期药物治疗后达到缓解。家族性TAK即使在直系亲属中也表现出显著的临床和影像学异质性。这些发现强调了临床警惕的重要性，并对出现提示症状的亲属进行及时评估，以便及时诊断并改善临床结局。

items.title: Association Between Prognostic Nutritional Index and Disease Activity in Patients with Rheumatoid Arthritis: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
items.abstract: The prognostic nutritional index (PNI), derived from serum albumin and lymphocyte count, reflects immunonutritional status and may be influenced by systemic inflammation. This study examined the association between PNI and disease activity in rheumatoid arthritis (RA). A total of 730 patients fulfilling the 2010 ACR/EULAR criteria were retrospectively analysed. Demographic, clinical, and laboratory data were collected; disease activity and disability were assessed using the DAS28-CRP and Health Assessment Questionnaire (HAQ). Correlation analyses, multivariable linear regression, ROC analyses, subgroup testing, and mediation analyses were performed. The mean age was 56.2±12.5 years and 76.3% were women. Median DAS28-CRP was 3.38, with 11.2% classified as having high disease activity. Mean PNI was 54.0±5.34. PNI was significantly lower in patients with high DAS28-CRP and in severe HAQ categories (p<0.01). PNI correlated negatively with DAS28-CRP, HAQ, CRP, ESR, and disease duration (all p<0.01). However, PNI was not independently associated with DAS28 or HAQ in adjusted regression models, whereas CRP and ESR remained significant predictors. ROC performance of PNI was modest (AUC 0.65-0.67). Associations were stronger in older adults and in men, and mediation analyses indicated that CRP and ESR largely explained the PNI-DAS28 relationship. Lower PNI was associated with greater RA burden, but this association appears to be largely driven by systemic inflammation.

items.titleZh: 预后营养指数与类风湿关节炎患者疾病活动度的关联：一项回顾性队列研究
items.abstractZh: 预后营养指数（PNI）由血清白蛋白和淋巴细胞计数计算得出，反映免疫营养状态，并可能受全身性炎症影响。本研究探讨了PNI与类风湿关节炎（RA）疾病活动度之间的关联。回顾性分析了730例符合2010年ACR/EULAR标准的患者。收集了人口统计学、临床和实验室数据；使用DAS28-CRP和健康评估问卷（HAQ）评估疾病活动度和残疾程度。进行了相关性分析、多变量线性回归、ROC分析、亚组检验和中介分析。平均年龄为56.2±12.5岁，76.3%为女性。DAS28-CRP中位数为3.38，11.2%被归类为高疾病活动度。平均PNI为54.0±5.34。高DAS28-CRP组和严重HAQ类别患者的PNI显著较低（p<0.01）。PNI与DAS28-CRP、HAQ、CRP、ESR和病程呈负相关（均p<0.01）。然而，在校正后的回归模型中，PNI与DAS28或HAQ无独立关联，而CRP和ESR仍为显著预测因子。PNI的ROC表现中等（AUC 0.65-0.67）。在老年人和男性中关联更强，中介分析表明CRP和ESR在很大程度上解释了PNI-DAS28关系。较低的PNI与较高的RA负担相关，但这种关联似乎主要由全身性炎症驱动。

items.title: Familial Mediterranean Fever and the Gut Microbiota: A Dual Perspective Review of Current Evidence.
items.abstract: Familial Mediterranean Fever is a well-known autoinflammatory disease resulting from mutations in the MEFV gene. A recent development has linked FMF pathogenesis and mode of expression to the gut micro-biota. There may be a change in the gut microbiota profile of FMF patients, characterised by low diversity and a depletion of beneficial bacteria. Dysbiosis tends to be linked to increased gut permeability, systemic inflammation, and low response to colchicine treatment. Probiotics and prebiotics, in this case, may help restore the previous idyllic state of the microbial balance, along with a reduction in inflammatory markers, thereby demonstrating therapeutic merit. Notably, however, it did argue in some instances that changes in the microbiota were secondary to the genetic and inflammatory nature of FMF itself. It is still important to carry out longitudinal studies of naïve patients that will integrate metagenomics with immune profiling to ascertain whether microbial changes arise from causes, contributions, or coincidence in the pathogenesis of FMF.

items.titleZh: 家族性地中海热与肠道微生物群：当前证据的双视角综述
items.abstractZh: 家族性地中海热是一种由MEFV基因突变引起的众所周知的自身炎症性疾病。最近的研究进展将FMF的发病机制和表达模式与肠道微生物群联系起来。FMF患者的肠道微生物群谱可能发生变化，其特征是多样性低和有益细菌减少。菌群失调往往与肠道通透性增加、全身性炎症以及对秋水仙碱治疗反应低有关。在这种情况下，益生菌和益生元可能有助于恢复先前理想的微生物平衡状态，同时减少炎症标志物，从而显示出治疗价值。然而，值得注意的是，在某些情况下，有观点认为微生物群的变化是FMF本身遗传和炎症性质的继发结果。仍然有必要对未治疗患者进行纵向研究，将宏基因组学与免疫分析相结合，以确定微生物变化是否源于FMF发病机制中的原因、贡献或巧合。

items.title: Persistent Antinuclear Antibodies Positivity Predicts Progression to Systemic Lupus Erythematosus in Paediatric Autoimmune Cytopenias: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
items.abstract: Autoimmune cytopenias (AIC) may be associated with positive antinuclear antibodies (ANA) and can precede the onset of systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE). This study assessed ANA as a predictive factor for progression to SLE in adolescents with AIC. Medical records from a paediatric haematology referral centre were retrospectively reviewed. Presence of ANA (titer>1:80) was recorded in 90 adolescents and children with AIC. Possible progression to SLE was evaluated in the group. A total of 90 patients with AIC were included, with a median age of 9 years and a predominance of ITP (67/90). ANA positivity was identified in 35/90 patients with AIC, most frequently in females (25/35). Among ANA-positive patients, 6/35 eventually developed SLE, whereas none of the ANA-negative patients progressed to SLE. Of the patients who developed SLE, the majority were female (5/6), with 5/6 initially diagnosed with autoimmune thrombocytopenia and 1 with Evans syndrome. The median age at AIC onset for those who later developed SLE was 10.4 years, and the median time interval between AIC diagnosis and SLE onset was 2.5 years. Additionally, 10/35 ANA-positive patients met high-risk criteria for future SLE according to Lambers et al. (2020), despite not fulfilling EULAR/ACR-2019 criteria for SLE at the time of review. Persistent ANA positivity in patients with AIC strongly predicts subsequent SLE, particularly in females older than 10 years with ITP. This finding warrants further investigation in larger, prospective studies, including follow-up of patients transitioning to adult care, as SLE may manifest later in adulthood.

items.title: B Cells or T Cells in the Development and Sustenance of Rheumatoid Arthritis: Who is the Potential Contributor?
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA) is a systemic autoimmune disorder characterised by chronic joint inflammation driven by both cellular and humoral immune mechanisms. Autoantibodies and autoreactive lymphocytes play central roles in disease onset and progression. Although therapeutic strategies targeting T lymphocytes (T cells) and B lymphocytes (B cells) have benefited many patients, the precise cell type driving RA pathogenesis remains debated. In genetically predisposed individuals, immune tolerance is disrupted by environmental triggers such as smoking, infections, and stress. Antigen-driven adaptive immune responses dominate RA, with B cells undergoing clonal expansion and somatic hypermutation to produce high-affinity autoantibodies, notably anti-citrullinated protein antibodies (ACPA) and rheumatoid factor (RF). Synovial inflammation exhibits diverse lymphocyte infiltration patterns, including diffuse inflammation (~50%), T-B cell aggregates with germinal centres (GC)~24%, and aggregates without GC ~20%. T cells within synovial tissue often display clonal restriction, enriched in memory and effector subsets such as CD4 + Th17, CD8 + resident memory, and innate-like T cells (γδ, MAIT, and NK cells), all contributing to persistent synovitis. Dysregulated cytokine signalling, particularly through the JAK/STAT pathway, characterises active disease. In ACPA-positive RA, autoantibodies enhance inflammation via innate immune activation, while B cells also function as antigen-presenting cells (APCs) that sustain T cell activation. However, in some patients, synovial autoimmunity may occur independently of GC formation or prominent B cell involvement, underscoring the disease's heterogeneity. This review highlights the evolving interplay between T and B cells from disease initiation to chronicity, which may help refine personalised immunotherapeutic approaches in RA.

items.title: Chronic Tophaceous Gout Masking Methicillin-Sensitive Staphylococcus aureus Bacteremia.
items.abstract: A 91-year-old woman with chronic tophaceous gout presented with worsening left foot pain, swelling, and purulent drainage after several months of presumed gout flares treated with prednisone and antibiotics. At presentation, she was septic with leukocytosis, elevated inflammatory markers, and imaging consistent with first metatarsophalangeal (MTP) osteomyelitis. Blood cultures grew methicillin-sensitive Staphylococcus aureus (MSSA). Further imaging demonstrated T12/L1 discitis and lumbar epidural phlegmon/abscess extending from L3/L4 to L5. Echocardiography showed a small filamentous structure on the mitral valve where vegetation could not be excluded. This case showcases diagnostic uncertainty when infection mimics gout and the need for early reassessment when symptoms fail to respond to conventional treatments.

items.titleZh: 慢性痛风石性痛风掩盖甲氧西林敏感金黄色葡萄球菌菌血症
items.abstractZh: 一位91岁女性慢性痛风石性痛风患者，因左脚疼痛、肿胀和脓性引流加重就诊，此前数月因疑似痛风发作接受泼尼松和抗生素治疗。就诊时，她出现脓毒症，伴有白细胞增多、炎症标志物升高，影像学检查符合第一跖趾关节（MTP）骨髓炎。血培养培养出甲氧西林敏感金黄色葡萄球菌（MSSA）。进一步影像学检查显示T12/L1椎间盘炎和从L3/L4延伸至L5的腰椎硬膜外蜂窝织炎/脓肿。超声心动图显示二尖瓣上有一个细小丝状结构，不能排除赘生物。本病例展示了感染模仿痛风时的诊断不确定性，以及当症状对常规治疗无反应时早期重新评估的必要性。

items.title: The Bustelo Bolus: Caffeine Withdrawal Mimicking Status Migrainosus in a Patient With Systemic Lupus Erythematosus and Systemic Sclerosis Overlap.
items.abstract: Caffeine is the most widely consumed psychoactive substance in the world, and abrupt cessation in habitual users produces a stereotyped withdrawal syndrome whose dominant feature is headache. Although caffeine withdrawal is a familiar diagnosis in ambulatory and perioperative practice, it is easily overlooked in hospitalized patients on a complex medical service, where the differential for new headache is dominated by autoimmune, infectious, and vascular etiologies. We report a 33-year-old woman with overlap connective tissue disease (systemic lupus erythematosus, mixed connective tissue disease, and systemic sclerosis) admitted for doxycycline-associated Stevens-Johnson syndrome and oral mucositis. On hospital day 3, she developed an excruciating bilateral throbbing headache with photophobia, phonophobia, and nausea. Magnetic resonance imaging of the brain and magnetic resonance angiography of the head were unremarkable apart from non-specific subcortical white matter foci. The headache was refractory to six acute migraine therapies and to a status migrainosus protocol, and a lumbar puncture was being prepared. After ingestion of approximately 8 oz of brewed black coffee from the nursing station, the headache resolved within 30 minutes and did not recur, and the planned lumbar puncture was deferred. The patient was discharged the same day. The presentation met the International Classification of Headache Disorders, 3rd edition, criteria for caffeine withdrawal headache. The case illustrates how an inexpensive caffeine challenge can serve as both a diagnostic and a therapeutic step before invasive workup in a hospitalized patient whose habitual oral caffeine intake has stopped abruptly. Routine intake history, including caffeine, should be elicited at admission for any patient anticipated to be nil per os or to have impaired oral intake.

items.titleZh: 布斯托洛丸：咖啡因戒断模拟偏头痛持续状态在一例系统性红斑狼疮和系统性硬化症重叠患者中
items.abstractZh: 咖啡因是世界上消费最广泛的精神活性物质，习惯性使用者突然停止使用会产生刻板的戒断综合征，其主要特征是头痛。尽管咖啡因戒断在门诊和围手术期实践中是常见的诊断，但在复杂医疗服务中的住院患者中容易被忽视，因为新发头痛的鉴别诊断主要由自身免疫性、感染性和血管性病因主导。我们报告一例33岁女性，患有重叠结缔组织病（系统性红斑狼疮、混合性结缔组织病和系统性硬化症），因多西环素相关的史蒂文斯-约翰逊综合征和口腔黏膜炎入院。住院第3天，她出现剧烈的双侧搏动性头痛，伴有畏光、畏声和恶心。脑磁共振成像和头部磁共振血管造影除非特异性皮质下白质病灶外无异常。头痛对六种急性偏头痛治疗和偏头痛持续状态方案均无效，正准备进行腰椎穿刺。在从护士站摄入约8盎司煮好的黑咖啡后，头痛在30分钟内缓解且未再复发，原计划的腰椎穿刺被推迟。患者当天出院。该表现符合国际头痛分类第三版中咖啡因戒断性头痛的标准。该病例说明，在习惯性口服咖啡因摄入突然停止的住院患者中，在进行侵入性检查之前，廉价的咖啡因激发试验可以作为诊断和治疗步骤。对于任何预计需要禁食或口服摄入受损的患者，应在入院时询问包括咖啡因在内的常规摄入史。

items.title: The Complex Surgical Management of Vertebral Fracture in a Patient With Undiagnosed Ankylosing Spondylitis: A Case Report.
items.abstract: Ankylosing spondylitis (AS) is a chronic inflammatory disorder that primarily affects the spine, resulting in progressive stiffness. Structural spinal changes increase susceptibility to fractures, even from minor trauma. These fractures are often unstable and can lead to neurological complications, posing significant challenges in surgical management. We present the case of a 60-year-old man who developed quadriplegia following a fall. Imaging revealed a displaced T3 vertebral fracture with spinal cord compression and findings consistent with AS. The patient underwent surgical stabilization with pedicle screws and interbody cage placement. Despite adequate spinal cord decompression, no postoperative neurological improvement was observed. This case highlights the increased fracture risk in AS and the complexities associated with its management.

items.titleZh: 未确诊强直性脊柱炎患者椎体骨折的复杂外科处理：一例病例报告
items.abstractZh: 强直性脊柱炎（AS）是一种主要影响脊柱的慢性炎症性疾病，导致进行性僵硬。脊柱结构性改变增加了骨折的易感性，即使是轻微创伤也可能引发骨折。这些骨折通常不稳定，并可能导致神经并发症，给外科处理带来重大挑战。我们报告一例60岁男性患者，在跌倒后出现四肢瘫痪。影像学显示T3椎体移位性骨折伴脊髓压迫，并发现符合AS的表现。患者接受了椎弓根螺钉和椎间融合器植入的手术稳定治疗。尽管脊髓减压充分，但术后未见神经功能改善。本病例强调了AS患者骨折风险增加及其处理中的复杂性。

items.title: Rash-Negative Dermatomyositis-Spectrum Overlap Myositis With PM/Scl Positivity Presenting With Progressive Pharyngeal Dysphagia.
items.abstract: Dermatomyositis-spectrum inflammatory myopathy may present without characteristic cutaneous findings, and overlap phenotypes can delay recognition when early neuromuscular examination is not yet diagnostic. We describe the case of a patient with rheumatology-diagnosed dermatomyositis without rash and PM/Scl-positive overlap myositis with systemic sclerosis features whose course was marked by interstitial lung disease, progressive weakness, and objectively confirmed pharyngeal dysphagia. A 64-year-old female with interstitial lung disease presented with several weeks of polyarthralgia, severe fatigue, and marked muscle enzyme elevation. Initial examination showed no rash, sclerodactyly, or proximal weakness. Laboratory evaluation demonstrated a creatine kinase level of 12,810 U/L, elevated transaminases, a high-titer antinuclear antibody, positive PM/Scl-100 and PM/Scl-75 antibodies, and a weakly positive Mi-2 antibody. She was diagnosed with dermatomyositis without rash and PM/Scl-positive overlap myositis with systemic sclerosis features and treated with prednisone, mycophenolate mofetil, hydroxychloroquine, and antimicrobial prophylaxis. Intravenous immunoglobulin (IVIG) was recommended but was not initially approved. Her course progressed to severe weakness and dysphagia, ultimately preventing oral medication administration. During hospitalization, a videofluoroscopic swallow evaluation demonstrated aspiration with thin liquids and pharyngeal phase dysphagia. She received IVIG, with subsequent improvement in swallowing and functional status. This report highlights the importance of an overlap-informed approach to inflammatory myopathy when classic cutaneous features are absent. Progressive dysphagia should be treated as a marker of severe disease because it increases the risk of aspiration, contributes to malnutrition, and may prevent the administration of oral immunosuppressive therapy.

items.titleZh: 无皮疹皮肌炎谱重叠肌炎伴PM/Scl阳性表现为进行性咽部吞咽困难
items.abstractZh: 皮肌炎谱炎症性肌病可能无特征性皮肤表现，重叠表型在早期神经肌肉检查尚未确诊时可能延误识别。我们描述一例风湿病诊断的无皮疹皮肌炎和PM/Scl阳性重叠肌炎伴系统性硬化症特征的患者，其病程以间质性肺病、进行性无力及客观证实的咽部吞咽困难为特征。一名64岁女性间质性肺病患者出现数周的多关节痛、严重疲劳和显著肌酶升高。初始检查未见皮疹、指端硬化或近端无力。实验室检查显示肌酸激酶水平为12,810 U/L，转氨酶升高，高滴度抗核抗体，PM/Scl-100和PM/Scl-75抗体阳性，以及弱阳性Mi-2抗体。她被诊断为无皮疹皮肌炎和PM/Scl阳性重叠肌炎伴系统性硬化症特征，并接受泼尼松、吗替麦考酚酯、羟氯喹和抗菌预防治疗。推荐静脉注射免疫球蛋白（IVIG）但最初未获批准。其病程进展至严重无力和吞咽困难，最终无法口服药物。住院期间，视频荧光吞咽评估显示稀液体误吸和咽期吞咽困难。她接受了IVIG治疗，随后吞咽功能和功能状态改善。本报告强调了在缺乏典型皮肤特征时，对炎症性肌病采取重叠导向方法的重要性。进行性吞咽困难应被视为严重疾病的标志，因为它增加误吸风险，导致营养不良，并可能妨碍口服免疫抑制治疗的实施。

items.title: Systemic Lupus Erythematosus Presenting With Febrile Illness and Hepatitis.
items.abstract: Lupus hepatitis is a rare initial manifestation of systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) and may present with abnormal liver function tests. Differentiating hepatic dysfunction related to SLE from other causes, particularly autoimmune hepatitis, is important because management and prognosis differ significantly depending on the underlying etiology. Liver biopsy may play a critical role in distinguishing lupus hepatitis from other causes of hepatic injury. We describe a case of a man with newly diagnosed SLE who presented with prolonged febrile illness and elevated transaminases.

items.titleZh: 以发热性疾病和肝炎为表现的系统性红斑狼疮
items.abstractZh: 狼疮性肝炎是系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）的一种罕见初始表现，可能伴有肝功能异常。区分与SLE相关的肝功能障碍与其他原因（特别是自身免疫性肝炎）非常重要，因为根据潜在病因的不同，治疗和预后差异显著。肝活检在区分狼疮性肝炎与其他肝损伤原因中可能发挥关键作用。我们描述了一例新诊断为SLE的男性患者，其表现为长期发热性疾病和转氨酶升高。

items.title: Beyond Inflammation: Associations of Depression and Anxiety With Fatigue in Rheumatoid Arthritis.
items.abstract: Background Fatigue is one of the most common and disabling symptoms in patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA). Although often attributed to inflammatory disease activity, psychological factors such as depression and anxiety may also contribute significantly. This study aimed to evaluate the association between fatigue and depressive and anxiety symptoms in patients with RA and to determine whether these associations persist after adjustment for clinical and demographic variables. Methods In this cross-sectional secondary analysis, 90 patients with rheumatoid arthritis were included. Fatigue was assessed using the Functional Assessment of Chronic Illness Therapy-Fatigue (FACIT-F) questionnaire. Depressive and anxiety symptoms were measured using the Beck Depression Inventory-II (BDI-II) and the Beck Anxiety Inventory (BAI). Disease activity was evaluated using the Disease Activity Score in 28 joints (DAS28). Associations were analyzed using Spearman's correlation, and multivariable linear regression models were used to identify independent predictors of fatigue. Results The median FACIT-F score was 37.0 (interquartile range (IQR): 27.0-45.0), although moderate-to-severe fatigue was present in 32 (35.6%) patients. Fatigue was moderately associated with disease activity (ρ = -0.38, p < 0.001) and strongly associated with depressive (ρ = -0.63, p < 0.001) and anxiety symptoms (ρ = -0.60, p < 0.001). In multivariable analysis, both depressive (β = -0.50, p = 0.008) and anxiety symptoms (β = -0.40, p = 0.002) remained independently associated with fatigue. Inclusion of psychological variables increased the explained variance in fatigue from 19.8% to 52.4% (ΔR² = 0.326). Conclusion Fatigue in rheumatoid arthritis appears to be associated not only with inflammatory disease activity but also with depressive and anxiety symptoms. These findings support a multidimensional biopsychosocial understanding of fatigue and indicate that psychological factors are important correlates of fatigue severity in rheumatoid arthritis.

items.titleZh: 超越炎症：类风湿关节炎中抑郁和焦虑与疲劳的关联
items.abstractZh: 背景 疲劳是类风湿关节炎（RA）患者最常见且致残的症状之一。虽然常归因于炎症性疾病活动，但抑郁和焦虑等心理因素也可能有显著贡献。本研究旨在评估RA患者中疲劳与抑郁和焦虑症状之间的关联，并确定这些关联在调整临床和人口统计学变量后是否仍然存在。方法 在这项横断面二次分析中，纳入了90例类风湿关节炎患者。使用慢性疾病治疗功能评估-疲劳（FACIT-F）问卷评估疲劳。使用贝克抑郁量表第二版（BDI-II）和贝克焦虑量表（BAI）测量抑郁和焦虑症状。使用28个关节疾病活动度评分（DAS28）评估疾病活动度。采用Spearman相关分析关联性，并使用多变量线性回归模型确定疲劳的独立预测因素。结果 FACIT-F评分中位数为37.0（四分位距（IQR）：27.0-45.0），32例（35.6%）患者存在中重度疲劳。疲劳与疾病活动度中度相关（ρ = -0.38，p < 0.001），与抑郁症状（ρ = -0.63，p < 0.001）和焦虑症状（ρ = -0.60，p < 0.001）强相关。在多变量分析中，抑郁症状（β = -0.50，p = 0.008）和焦虑症状（β = -0.40，p = 0.002）均与疲劳独立相关。纳入心理变量后，疲劳的解释方差从19.8%增加到52.4%（ΔR² = 0.326）。结论 类风湿关节炎中的疲劳不仅与炎症性疾病活动相关，还与抑郁和焦虑症状相关。这些发现支持疲劳的多维生物心理社会理解，并表明心理因素是类风湿关节炎疲劳严重程度的重要相关因素。

items.title: Probable Arteritic Posterior Ischemic Optic Neuropathy with Atypical Recovery Secondary to Biologically Occult Giant Cell Arteritis: A Case Report.
items.abstract: Posterior ischemic optic neuropathy (PION) is a rare form of ischemic optic neuropathy, and arteritic PION secondary to giant cell arteritis (GCA) usually has a poor prognosis. We report a rare case of probable arteritic PION secondary to GCA with an atypically slow course and remarkable visual recovery. A 66-year-old man under mild chronic immunosuppression for autologous bone marrow transplantation presented with progressive visual loss and normal inflammatory markers (erythrocyte sedimentation rate [ESR] 14 mm/h, C-reactive protein [CRP] 1.10 mg/L). Contrast-enhanced orbital and cerebral MRI showed no vasculitic or perioptic abnormalities. Despite the atypical presentation, temporal artery biopsy performed 10 days after high-dose corticosteroid initiation confirmed healed GCA. The patient experienced major recovery of central vision (visual acuity 0.9) after 1 month of treatment. This case highlights the diagnostic challenge of biologically and radiologically silent GCA, the potential modifying role of chronic immunosuppression on disease course and recovery, and the importance of maintaining suspicion for arteritic etiologies and considering temporal artery biopsy even when ESR, CRP, and MRI are normal.

items.titleZh: 可能继发于生物学隐匿性巨细胞动脉炎的动脉炎性后部缺血性视神经病变伴非典型恢复：一例病例报告
items.abstractZh: 后部缺血性视神经病变（PION）是一种罕见的缺血性视神经病变，继发于巨细胞动脉炎（GCA）的动脉炎性PION通常预后不良。我们报告一例罕见的可能继发于GCA的动脉炎性PION，病程异常缓慢且视力恢复显著。一名66岁男性因自体骨髓移植接受轻度慢性免疫抑制治疗，表现为进行性视力下降，炎症标志物正常（红细胞沉降率[ESR] 14 mm/h，C反应蛋白[CRP] 1.10 mg/L）。增强眼眶和脑部MRI未显示血管炎或视神经周围异常。尽管表现不典型，但在大剂量皮质类固醇治疗开始后10天进行的颞动脉活检证实为愈合期GCA。治疗1个月后，患者中心视力显著恢复（视力0.9）。本病例强调了生物学和影像学隐匿性GCA的诊断挑战、慢性免疫抑制对病程和恢复的潜在调节作用，以及在ESR、CRP和MRI正常时仍应警惕动脉炎性病因并考虑颞动脉活检的重要性。

items.title: Echocardiography-Derived Exercise Pulmonary Hypertension and Longitudinal Changes in Pulmonary Artery Pressures in Systemic Sclerosis: A Non-Invasive Assessment for Risk Stratification.
items.abstract: Pulmonary artery pressures (PAPs) often become abnormal during exercise in patients with systemic sclerosis (SSc). This study sought to determine whether exercise-induced pulmonary hypertension (EIPH) assessed by exercise stress echocardiography (ESE) would be associated with subsequent increases in resting PAPs in patients with SSc. Patients with SSc who underwent serial echocardiography > 6 months apart were retrospectively screened ( n  = 543). Of those, patients undergoing ESE were divided based on the presence of EIPH, defined as estimated mean PAP (mPAP) > 30 mmHg during exercise and a mPAP/cardiac output (CO) > 3 mmHg/L/min. Patients who did not undergo ESE and had a mPAP < 20 mmHg were selected as controls ( n  = 198). The primary endpoint was a longitudinal change in sPAP from baseline to last follow-up echocardiography. Compared to controls and patients with non-EIPH ( n  = 71), those with EIPH ( n  = 56) had a higher sPAP at baseline (22 ± 4 mmHg, 28 ± 6 mmHg, and 31 ± 6 mmHg, p  < 0.0001). Over a median follow-up duration of 2.4 years, a longitudinal change in resting sPAP from baseline to follow-up echocardiography was higher in patients with EIPH than those without (+ 1.2 mmHg vs. -1.0 mmHg, p  = 0.048). In a sensitivity analysis excluding 30 patients who received pulmonary vasodilators or heart failure medications after baseline echocardiography, the difference in sPAP change over time between the two groups increased further (+ 2.2 mmHg in the EIPH group vs. -1.6 mmHg in the non-EIPH group, p  = 0.0008). In conclusion, echocardiography-derived EIPH was associated with a longitudinal increase in sPAP, supporting ESE as a non-invasive tool for risk stratification in SSc-PH.

items.titleZh: 超声心动图衍生的运动性肺动脉高压与系统性硬化症患者肺动脉压力的纵向变化：一种用于风险分层的无创评估方法
items.abstractZh: 系统性硬化症（SSc）患者的肺动脉压力（PAPs）常在运动时出现异常。本研究旨在探讨通过运动负荷超声心动图（ESE）评估的运动性肺动脉高压（EIPH）是否与SSc患者静息PAPs的后续升高相关。回顾性筛选了接受间隔>6个月的连续超声心动图检查的SSc患者（n=543）。其中，接受ESE的患者根据是否存在EIPH进行分组，EIPH定义为运动期间估计平均肺动脉压（mPAP）>30 mmHg且mPAP/心输出量（CO）>3 mmHg/L/min。未接受ESE且mPAP<20 mmHg的患者被选为对照组（n=198）。主要终点是从基线到末次随访超声心动图的sPAP纵向变化。与对照组和无EIPH患者（n=71）相比，EIPH患者（n=56）的基线sPAP更高（22±4 mmHg、28±6 mmHg和31±6 mmHg，p<0.0001）。在中位随访2.4年期间，从基线到随访超声心动图的静息sPAP纵向变化在EIPH患者中高于无EIPH患者（+1.2 mmHg vs. -1.0 mmHg，p=0.048）。在排除基线超声心动图后接受肺血管扩张剂或心力衰竭药物治疗的30名患者的敏感性分析中，两组间sPAP随时间变化的差异进一步增大（EIPH组+2.2 mmHg vs. 无EIPH组-1.6 mmHg，p=0.0008）。总之，超声心动图衍生的EIPH与sPAP的纵向升高相关，支持ESE作为SSc-PH风险分层的无创工具。

items.title: Synovial histopathology in rheumatoid arthritis treated with biological disease-modifying antirheumatic drugs: an analysis of 1593 surgical specimens using the Rooney score.
items.abstract: This study aims to evaluate synovial histopathological inflammation in rheumatoid arthritis (RA) using the Rooney score (RS) and to investigate histopathological heterogeneity within difficult-to-treat (D2T) RA. We analysed 1593 synovial specimens from 1043 patients with RA who underwent joint surgery between 2013 and 2023. Histological inflammation was assessed by a blinded pathologist using a modified RS (total score, 0-60). Patients were classified as biological disease-modifying antirheumatic drug (bDMARD)-naïve or bDMARD-treated; the treated group was further subdivided into D2T and non-D2T RA according to the 2021 European League Against Rheumatism definition. Associations between RS and clinical markers, including C-reactive protein (CRP), Disease Activity Score 28-erythrocyte sedimentation rate (DAS28-ESR), matrix metalloproteinase-3 (MMP-3), and power Doppler (PD) grade, were examined. Exploratory analyses further stratified D2T RA into inflammatory and noninflammatory subtypes based on objective inflammatory markers. RS was significantly lower in bDMARD-treated patients than in bDMARD-naïve patients, indicating histological attenuation of synovial inflammation. Item-wise analysis showed lower scores for synoviocyte hyperplasia and lymphocytic infiltration and higher fibrosis scores in the treated group. Total RS correlated with CRP, DAS28-ESR, MMP-3, and PD grade. Among bDMARD-treated patients, RS did not differ between D2T and non-D2T RA, whereas MMP-3 levels were higher in D2T RA. In exploratory analyses, inflammatory D2T RA showed higher RS and MMP-3 levels than noninflammatory D2T RA. bDMARD therapy attenuates synovial inflammation histologically, and RS reflects local inflammatory activity. Exploratory analyses suggested that the synovial histopathology may provide complementary information on inflammatory heterogeneity within D2T RA, which may not be fully captured by the conventional clinical indices.

items.titleZh: 生物疾病改善抗风湿药物治疗类风湿关节炎的滑膜组织病理学：使用Rooney评分对1593份手术标本的分析
items.abstractZh: 本研究旨在使用Rooney评分（RS）评估类风湿关节炎（RA）的滑膜组织病理学炎症，并探讨难治性（D2T）RA内的组织病理学异质性。我们分析了2013年至2023年间接受关节手术的1043例RA患者的1593份滑膜标本。由一名盲法病理学家使用改良RS（总分0-60）评估组织学炎症。患者被分为生物疾病改善抗风湿药物（bDMARD）初治组或bDMARD治疗组；治疗组进一步根据2021年欧洲抗风湿病联盟定义分为D2T和非D2T RA。检查了RS与临床标志物（包括C反应蛋白（CRP）、疾病活动评分28-红细胞沉降率（DAS28-ESR）、基质金属蛋白酶-3（MMP-3）和能量多普勒（PD）分级）之间的关联。探索性分析进一步根据客观炎症标志物将D2T RA分为炎症性和非炎症性亚型。bDMARD治疗组患者的RS显著低于bDMARD初治组，表明滑膜炎症的组织学减轻。项目分析显示，治疗组中滑膜细胞增生和淋巴细胞浸润评分较低，而纤维化评分较高。总RS与CRP、DAS28-ESR、MMP-3和PD分级相关。在bDMARD治疗患者中，D2T和非D2T RA之间的RS无差异，而D2T RA的MMP-3水平较高。在探索性分析中，炎症性D2T RA的RS和MMP-3水平高于非炎症性D2T RA。bDMARD治疗在组织学上减轻滑膜炎症，RS反映局部炎症活动。探索性分析提示，滑膜组织病理学可能为D2T RA内的炎症异质性提供补充信息，而传统临床指标可能无法完全捕捉到这些信息。

items.title: Early progression of systemic sclerosis: a longitudinal cohort study on disease evolution and microvascular changes.
items.abstract: This study aimed to evaluate the time from early-stage systemic sclerosis (SSc), to the onset of significant disease progression. A secondary objective was to identify early clinical features most strongly associated with disease progression. Additionally, the study examined the course of microvascular changes over time. In this prospective longitudinal cohort study (Hit Hard and Early trial, 3 years open label follow-up), we included patients who met the adjusted Very Early Diagnosis of Systemic Sclerosis criteria, with puffy fingers for less than 3 years. Disease progression was defined as skin or organ involvement. Microvascular changes were tracked through serial nailfold videocapillaroscopy, and Kaplan-Meier estimates were used to analyse time to disease progression. Baseline predictors of progression were explored with univariate logistic regression. Thirty patients were included, 70% female, with a median duration of puffy fingers of 5.5 months. Anticentromere antibodies were present in 73%, and 75% showed an active nailfold capillaroscopy pattern at baseline. Over 3 years, 43% (95% CI: 25.6%-61.2%) developed clinically significant disease progression, predominantly manifesting as pitting scars, digital ulcers, and/or skin thickening. Mean capillary density declined over time, and 55% of patients with an early SSc capillaroscopy pattern progressed to an active or late pattern within 24 months. A large proportion of patients showed clinically relevant disease progression within 3 years. In spite of the limited sample size, the strong association between anti-ribonucleoprotein (anti-RNP) antibodies and disease progression underlines the prognostic value of this biomarker. Frequent and standardised nailfold capillaroscopy imaging provided insights into microvascular changes.

items.titleZh: 系统性硬化症的早期进展：关于疾病演变和微血管变化的纵向队列研究
items.abstractZh: 本研究旨在评估从早期系统性硬化症（SSc）到出现显著疾病进展的时间。次要目标是确定与疾病进展最相关的早期临床特征。此外，研究还考察了微血管随时间变化的进程。在这项前瞻性纵向队列研究（Hit Hard and Early试验，3年开放标签随访）中，我们纳入了符合调整后的极早期系统性硬化症诊断标准、手指肿胀持续时间不足3年的患者。疾病进展定义为皮肤或器官受累。通过系列甲襞视频毛细血管镜追踪微血管变化，并使用Kaplan-Meier估计分析疾病进展时间。通过单变量逻辑回归探索进展的基线预测因素。共纳入30例患者，70%为女性，中位手指肿胀持续时间为5.5个月。73%的患者存在抗着丝点抗体，75%的患者基线时显示活动性甲襞毛细血管镜模式。3年内，43%（95% CI: 25.6%-61.2%）出现临床显著疾病进展，主要表现为凹陷性瘢痕、指端溃疡和/或皮肤增厚。平均毛细血管密度随时间下降，55%的早期SSc毛细血管镜模式患者在24个月内进展为活动性或晚期模式。大部分患者在3年内出现临床相关疾病进展。尽管样本量有限，但抗核糖核蛋白（抗RNP）抗体与疾病进展之间的强关联强调了该生物标志物的预后价值。频繁且标准化的甲襞毛细血管镜成像提供了对微血管变化的见解。

items.title: Patients' experiences of managing lifestyle habits following a rheumatoid arthritis diagnosis.
items.abstract: Patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA) can reduce their increased risk for cardiovascular diseases and improve symptoms and quality of life with healthy lifestyle habits. This study aimed to explore patients' experiences of managing their lifestyle habits following a diagnosis of RA. In this qualitative study, 20 patients with RA, 14 women, and 6 men, were included. Individual semistructured interviews were conducted, and a qualitative content analysis resulted in 7 subcategories and 3 categories. Patients' experiences of managing lifestyle habits following a diagnosis of RA included perceived barriers, strategies, and benefits associated with adopting a healthy lifestyle. Barriers were described in relation to pain, impaired function, and feelings of being overwhelmed by a new diagnosis. Strategies were shaped by newly acquired knowledge and positive experiences that served as sources of motivation. The benefits of healthy lifestyle habits were linked to enhanced physical and psychological well-being and improved RA management. This study shows that patients following an RA diagnosis experience not only barriers to adopting a healthy lifestyle, but also strategies and benefits that support healthy lifestyle changes.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎诊断后患者管理生活习惯的体验
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎（RA）患者可以通过健康的生活习惯降低心血管疾病风险，改善症状和生活质量。本研究旨在探讨患者在诊断为RA后管理生活习惯的体验。这项定性研究纳入了20名RA患者，其中14名女性和6名男性。进行了个体半结构化访谈，并通过定性内容分析得出7个亚类别和3个类别。患者在诊断为RA后管理生活习惯的体验包括与采纳健康生活方式相关的障碍、策略和益处。障碍与疼痛、功能受损以及被新诊断压垮的感觉有关。策略由新获得的知识和作为动机来源的积极经验塑造。健康生活习惯的益处与增强的身心健康以及改善的RA管理相关。本研究表明，RA诊断后的患者不仅面临采纳健康生活方式的障碍，还拥有支持健康生活方式改变的策略和益处。

items.title: Efficacy, safety, and immunogenicity of proposed biosimilar RGB-19 and tocilizumab intravenously administered to adults with active rheumatoid arthritis and an inadequate response to methotrexate: a phase 3, randomised study.
items.abstract: This phase 3 study (jRCT2031220512) evaluated the equivalence in efficacy, and compared the serum concentration, pharmacodynamics, safety, and immunogenicity of proposed biosimilar RGB-19 and tocilizumab in adults with active rheumatoid arthritis (RA). Participants were randomly assigned 1:1 to intravenous infusions of 8 mg/kg RGB-19 or tocilizumab every 4 weeks, with efficacy evaluated to week 52 and safety follow-up to week 54. The primary endpoint was the mean change from baseline (CfB) in Disease Activity Score based on 28 joints with erythrocyte sedimentation rate (DAS28-ESR), with equivalence determined if the 2-sided 95% CI for the pooled difference between groups was within the predefined equivalence margin (±0.6 at week 12). Secondary objectives were other efficacy indicators, serum drug concentration, pharmacodynamics, safety, and immunogenicity. In total, 368 participants were randomly assigned to treatment (RGB-19 N = 182; tocilizumab N = 186). At week 12, the difference in mean DAS28-ESR CfB between groups (RGB-19 n = 173; tocilizumab n = 181) was -0.21 (95% CI: -0.43, 0.02; within the equivalence margin). All other efficacy indicators and serum drug concentration values were similar between groups up to week 52. Median absolute neutrophil count, C-reactive protein, and soluble interleukin-6 receptor values were similar between groups to week 52. Safety profiles were similar, with a similar incidence of treatment-emergent adverse events and adverse drug reactions to week 54. The incidence of treatment-emergent antidrug and neutralising antibodies was similarly low in both groups. This study demonstrated equivalent efficacy, and similar safety and immunogenicity, of RGB-19 and reference tocilizumab for participants with active RA.

items.titleZh: 拟议生物类似药RGB-19与托珠单抗静脉给药治疗活动性类风湿关节炎且对甲氨蝶呤应答不充分的成人患者的疗效、安全性和免疫原性：一项3期随机研究
items.abstractZh: 这项3期研究（jRCT2031220512）评估了拟议生物类似药RGB-19与托珠单抗在活动性类风湿关节炎（RA）成人患者中的疗效等效性，并比较了血清浓度、药效学、安全性和免疫原性。参与者按1:1随机分配接受每4周静脉输注8 mg/kg的RGB-19或托珠单抗，疗效评估至第52周，安全性随访至第54周。主要终点是基于28个关节的疾病活动度评分（使用红细胞沉降率，DAS28-ESR）相对于基线的平均变化（CfB），若两组间合并差异的双侧95% CI在预设等效界值（第12周±0.6）内，则判定为等效。次要目标包括其他疗效指标、血清药物浓度、药效学、安全性和免疫原性。共有368名参与者被随机分配接受治疗（RGB-19组N=182；托珠单抗组N=186）。第12周时，两组间DAS28-ESR CfB均值的差异（RGB-19组n=173；托珠单抗组n=181）为-0.21（95% CI：-0.43, 0.02；在等效界值内）。截至第52周，所有其他疗效指标和血清药物浓度值在两组间相似。截至第52周，中性粒细胞绝对计数、C反应蛋白和可溶性白细胞介素-6受体的中位值在两组间相似。安全性特征相似，截至第54周，治疗期间出现的不良事件和药物不良反应的发生率相似。两组中治疗期间出现的抗药抗体和中和抗体的发生率均较低。本研究证明，对于活动性RA患者，RGB-19与参照托珠单抗具有等效的疗效以及相似的安全性和免疫原性。

items.title: Spondyloarthritis and inflammatory bowel disease: towards a more severe and refractory disease phenotype.
items.abstract: The coexistence of inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) and spondyloarthritis (SpA) poses significant diagnostic and therapeutic challenges. This study aimed to compare clinical characteristics and treatment profiles of patients with both SpA and IBD (SpA/IBD) to those with SpA or IBD alone. We performed a single-centre observational study including 62 consecutive patients with SpA/IBD followed between 2019 and 2022. Patients met Assessment of SpondyloArthritis International Society 2009 criteria for SpA and had confirmed IBD. Demographics, clinical features, imaging, and biologic disease-modifying antirheumatic drug (bDMARD) usage were collected. For comparison, we included 100 patients with a single diagnosis of SpA or IBD, representing the Maladies Inflammatoires SysTémIques Chroniques cohort enrolled over the same period. Among patients with SpA/IBD (51% male, 67% HLA-B27+), IBD was more often diagnosed first. Compared with SpA alone, patients with SpA/IBD had more psoriasis (27% vs 17%, P = .04), uveitis (27% vs 18%, P = .08), and smoking (66% vs 44.9%, P = .01), but lower HLA-B27 positivity (63% vs 80%, P = .002). They also received more bDMARDs (2.8 ± 1.7 vs 2.0 ± 1.15, P = .01). Compared with IBD alone, patients with SpA/IBD had higher rates of uveitis (27% vs 1%, P = .08), psoriasis (27% vs 20%, P = .04), smoking (66% vs 44.9%, P = .01), and greater disease activity (Harvey-Bradshaw Index at diagnosis 8.2 ± 5.7 vs 2.6 ± 3.1, P = .0006). Notably, 31.75% met criteria for difficult-to-manage disease, exceeding the 9% reported in SpA monodiagnosis. Combination bDMARD therapy was required in 9.7% of patients with SpA/IBD, significantly more than in single-diagnosis groups ( P < .05). Patients with SpA/IBD exhibit more severe disease and therapeutic challenges, highlighting the need for tailored management and consideration of earlier combination biologic therapies.

items.titleZh: 脊柱关节炎与炎症性肠病：朝向更严重和难治的疾病表型
items.abstractZh: 炎症性肠病（IBD）与脊柱关节炎（SpA）的共存带来了显著的诊断和治疗挑战。本研究旨在比较同时患有SpA和IBD（SpA/IBD）的患者与仅患有SpA或IBD患者的临床特征和治疗方案。我们进行了一项单中心观察性研究，纳入2019年至2022年间随访的62例连续SpA/IBD患者。患者符合国际脊柱关节炎评估协会2009年SpA标准，并确诊IBD。收集人口统计学、临床特征、影像学及生物疾病修饰抗风湿药物（bDMARD）使用情况。作为对照，我们纳入了同期Maladies Inflammatoires SysTémIques Chroniques队列中100例单一诊断SpA或IBD患者。在SpA/IBD患者中（51%男性，67%HLA-B27+），IBD更常首先诊断。与单纯SpA相比，SpA/IBD患者银屑病（27% vs 17%，P = .04）、葡萄膜炎（27% vs 18%，P = .08）和吸烟（66% vs 44.9%，P = .01）发生率更高，但HLA-B27阳性率较低（63% vs 80%，P = .002）。他们接受更多bDMARD治疗（2.8 ± 1.7 vs 2.0 ± 1.15，P = .01）。与单纯IBD相比，SpA/IBD患者葡萄膜炎（27% vs 1%，P = .08）、银屑病（27% vs 20%，P = .04）、吸烟（66% vs 44.9%，P = .01）发生率更高，疾病活动度更大（诊断时Harvey-Bradshaw指数8.2 ± 5.7 vs 2.6 ± 3.1，P = .0006）。值得注意的是，31.75%符合难治性疾病标准，超过单纯SpA报道的9%。9.7%的SpA/IBD患者需要联合bDMARD治疗，显著高于单一诊断组（P < .05）。SpA/IBD患者表现出更严重的疾病和治疗挑战，强调需要个体化管理并考虑早期联合生物治疗。

items.title: EGPAware: a European Delphi consensus study on red flags for suspicion of eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis.
items.abstract: Diagnosing eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis (EGPA) is challenging due to its rarity, multisystem involvement, and varied clinical presentation, often resulting in delayed diagnoses and associated complications. EGPAware project aimed to establish a first European Delphi consensus on red flags for raising suspicion of EGPA to assist the prompt identification, referral, and diagnosis of these patients. EGPAware was a European Delphi study led by a multidisciplinary committee that developed the survey based on the red flags from a previously published Spanish systematic review and focused on clinical suspicion indicators. Data analysis used descriptive statistics, with consensus defined as ≥70% agreement. Statements with <70% consensus in the first round were revisited again in round 2. In the second round, panellists additionally ranked the 10 most relevant red flags by clinical importance and frequency of observation. A multidisciplinary European group of 53 physicians with expertise in EGPA completed the 2-round Delphi survey. Consensus was reached on 25 red flags. Mononeuritis multiplex, lung infiltrates/nodules, vasculitis on biopsy, and myeloperoxidase-antineutrophil cytoplasmic antibodies positivity were the highest-ranked signs based on clinical relevance, whereas lung infiltrates/nodules, nasal polyposis, and mononeuritis multiplex were most frequently observed in panellists' experience. The EGPAware study provides a useful checklist of consensual red flags to be used in clinical practice to help clinicians identify patients with EGPA early. The study supports a multidisciplinary approach to EGPA diagnosis and management. Further research is recommended to refine diagnostic tools and validate these findings.

items.titleZh: EGPAware：欧洲关于嗜酸性肉芽肿性多血管炎疑似红色警示标志的德尔菲共识研究
items.abstractZh: 诊断嗜酸性肉芽肿性多血管炎（EGPA）具有挑战性，因其罕见、多系统受累及临床表现多样，常导致诊断延迟及相关并发症。EGPAware项目旨在建立首个欧洲德尔菲共识，确定提示EGPA疑似病例的红色警示标志，以协助早期识别、转诊和诊断这些患者。EGPAware是一项由多学科委员会领导的欧洲德尔菲研究，该委员会基于先前发表的西班牙系统综述中的红色警示标志制定了调查问卷，并重点关注临床疑似指标。数据分析采用描述性统计，共识定义为≥70%的一致性。第一轮中一致性低于70%的陈述在第二轮中重新审议。在第二轮中，专家组成员还根据临床重要性和观察频率对10个最相关的红色警示标志进行了排序。一个由53名具有EGPA专业知识的欧洲多学科医生组成的团队完成了两轮德尔菲调查。最终就25个红色警示标志达成共识。多发性单神经炎、肺部浸润/结节、活检显示血管炎以及髓过氧化物酶-抗中性粒细胞胞浆抗体阳性是基于临床相关性排名最高的标志，而肺部浸润/结节、鼻息肉病和多发性单神经炎是专家组成员经验中最常观察到的。EGPAware研究提供了一个有用的共识性红色警示标志清单，可用于临床实践，帮助临床医生早期识别EGPA患者。该研究支持采用多学科方法进行EGPA的诊断和管理。建议进一步研究以完善诊断工具并验证这些发现。

items.title: Radiomics to discriminate between axial spondyloarthritis and axial psoriatic arthritis and to predict TNFi therapy persistence.
items.abstract: Axial spondyloarthritis (axSpA) and axial psoriatic arthritis (axPsA) represent entities with ongoing debate regarding their classification as distinct diseases or variants of the same condition. Although magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is instrumental in diagnosing, traditional assessment may not fully capture subtle differences between them. This study aims to investigate whether radiomic features extracted from sacroiliac joint (SIJ) bone marrow oedema (BME) on MRI can discriminate between axSpA and axPsA, and predict tumour necrosis factor inhibitor (TNFi) therapy persistence in patients with axSpA. We included patients who underwent an SIJ MRI at our hospital. BME regions were segmented on short-tau inversion-recovery sequences, and 120 standardised radiomic features were extracted using PyRadiomics. For diagnostic discrimination, an XGBoost algorithm was employed and evaluated through 5-fold cross-validation. For patients with axSpA who initiated TNFi therapy, an exploratory Cox regression analysis was performed to identify radiomic predictors of treatment persistence. We analysed MRI scans from 66 patients (41 axSpA, 25 axPsA). The XGBoost classifier achieved an accuracy of 0.80 ± 0.07 and area under the receiver operating characteristic curve of 0.77 ± 0.09 in differentiating axSpA from axPsA. The most discriminative features included texture parameters, shape characteristics, and grey-level intensity distributions. For TNFi persistence, multivariate Cox regression identified 2 shape-based features as independent predictors: increased sphericity, associated with discontinuation risk (hazard ratio [HR] 2.10, 95% CI: 1.09-4.05), while increased elongation showed a protective effect (HR 0.50, 95% CI: 0.25-0.99). This proof-of-concept study suggests radiomic SIJ BME features may help differentiate axSpA and axPsA and could be associated with TNFi persistence in patients with axSpA. These preliminary findings suggest that these conditions may exhibit distinct radiomic phenotypes.

items.titleZh: 放射组学鉴别中轴型脊柱关节炎与中轴型银屑病关节炎并预测TNFi治疗持续性
items.abstractZh: 中轴型脊柱关节炎（axSpA）和中轴型银屑病关节炎（axPsA）是两种疾病实体，关于它们应被视为独立疾病还是同一疾病的不同变体仍存在争议。尽管磁共振成像（MRI）在诊断中至关重要，但传统评估可能无法完全捕捉两者之间的细微差异。本研究旨在探讨从骶髂关节（SIJ）骨髓水肿（BME）MRI中提取的放射组学特征能否区分axSpA和axPsA，并预测axSpA患者肿瘤坏死因子抑制剂（TNFi）治疗的持续性。我们纳入了在我院接受SIJ MRI检查的患者。在短tau反转恢复序列上分割BME区域，并使用PyRadiomics提取120个标准化放射组学特征。对于诊断鉴别，采用XGBoost算法并通过5折交叉验证进行评估。对于开始TNFi治疗的axSpA患者，进行探索性Cox回归分析以确定治疗持续性的放射组学预测因子。我们分析了66例患者（41例axSpA，25例axPsA）的MRI扫描。XGBoost分类器在区分axSpA和axPsA方面达到了0.80±0.07的准确率和0.77±0.09的受试者工作特征曲线下面积。最具鉴别力的特征包括纹理参数、形状特征和灰度强度分布。对于TNFi持续性，多变量Cox回归确定了2个基于形状的特征作为独立预测因子：球形度增加与停药风险相关（风险比[HR] 2.10，95% CI: 1.09-4.05），而伸长率增加显示出保护作用（HR 0.50，95% CI: 0.25-0.99）。这项概念验证研究表明，SIJ BME的放射组学特征可能有助于区分axSpA和axPsA，并可能与axSpA患者的TNFi治疗持续性相关。这些初步发现提示，这些疾病可能表现出不同的放射组学表型。

items.title: Assessment of drug levels as a biomarker in rheumatoid arthritis.
items.abstract: In this viewpoint, we focused on 2 examples of the assessments of drug levels as a biomarker in rheumatoid arthritis (RA), based on our experiences in longitudinal studies and clinical trials. Among a long list of potential biomarkers in rheumatology, the measurements of drug levels for the efficacy and toxicity of the drugs have been extensively investigated. One example is the levels of methotrexate (MTX)-polyglutamates (PGs), and the second one is that of biological disease-modifying antirheumatic drugs (DMARDs) in patients with RA. Recently, meta-analyses and population pharmacokinetics-pharmacodynamics studies have been published, confirming the previous reports. After these publications, we experienced the new information about the measurements of MTX-PGs in a prospective multicenter clinical trial. In addition, we also experienced the measurements of drug levels of a unique bDMARD, ozoralizumab, a bispecific Variable domain of Heavy chain of Heavy chain antibody (VHH) molecule, which is directed against TNF α and albumin in clinical trials. We introduced our experiences and explored the viewpoint of the measurements of drug levels as a biomarker in RA.

items.titleZh: 药物水平作为类风湿关节炎生物标志物的评估
items.abstractZh: 在这篇观点文章中，我们基于在纵向研究和临床试验中的经验，重点讨论了药物水平作为类风湿关节炎（RA）生物标志物的2个评估实例。在风湿病学中众多潜在生物标志物中，药物水平对药物疗效和毒性的测量已被广泛研究。一个例子是甲氨蝶呤（MTX）-多聚谷氨酸（PGs）的水平，另一个是RA患者中生物疾病修饰抗风湿药物（DMARDs）的水平。最近，已发表荟萃分析和群体药代动力学-药效学研究，证实了先前的报告。在这些发表后，我们在一个前瞻性多中心临床试验中获得了关于MTX-PGs测量的新信息。此外，我们还在临床试验中测量了一种独特的bDMARD——奥佐利珠单抗（ozoralizumab）的药物水平，这是一种针对TNFα和白蛋白的双特异性重链抗体可变域（VHH）分子。我们介绍了我们的经验，并探讨了药物水平作为RA生物标志物测量的观点。

items.title: Characterising subgroups of difficult-to-treat rheumatoid arthritis in real-world clinical settings.
items.abstract: To evaluate the proportion of persistent inflammatory refractory rheumatoid arthritis (PIRRA) and noninflammatory refractory rheumatoid arthritis (NIRRA) of difficult-to-treat rheumatoid arthritis (D2T-RA) using musculoskeletal ultrasound (MSUS) and to compare clinical characteristics across PIRRA, NIRRA, and disease-controlled refractory rheumatoid arthritis (RA) subgroups. A retrospective single-centre cohort study identified patients (May 2021 to December 2022) with inadequate response to ≥2 different mechanism of action biologic/targeted synthetic disease-modifying antirheumatic drugs (b/tsDMARDs) and disease activity score in 28 joints-erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR) of >3.2 as European Alliance of Associations for Rheumatology-defined D2T-RA. MSUS classified this group into PIRRA (power Doppler present) or NIRRA (no power Doppler synovitis). A comparator group of controlled refractory RA (≥2 b/tsDMARD failures but sustained low disease activity) was also assessed. Clinical data were collected and analysed. Of the 85 patients, 45 had D2T-RA (25 [56%] PIRRA; 20 [44%] NIRRA), and 40 had controlled refractory RA. PIRRA subgroup had higher C-reactive protein (CRP), but NIRRA subgroup higher ESR. Fibromyalgia was more prevalent in PIRRA and NIRRA than that in controlled refractory RA (48%, 40%, and 17.5%, respectively; P = .02). Nearly half of patients in the controlled refractory group (17/37 [46%]) had subclinical synovitis on MSUS. Rates of radiographic erosions were similar across PIRRA, NIRRA, and controlled refractory groups. MSUS-based stratification of D2T-RA into PIRRA and NIRRA reveals distinct associations to CRP and ESR and comparable chronic pain. Subclinical inflammation is present even in ostensibly controlled disease, suggesting risk of re-falling into an active D2T-RA state. Identifying such subphenotypes can inform on monitoring strategies, support mechanistic investigation, and enable more targeted treatments to improve outcomes of D2T-RA.

items.title: Blood-based gene signatures associated with therapeutic response to anti-TNF therapy in rheumatoid arthritis: a combined meta-analytical and machine learning approach.
items.abstract: Tumour necrosis factor alpha (TNF-α) inhibitors have significantly improved outcomes in rheumatoid arthritis (RA); however, up to 30% to 40% of patients show inadequate response. This highlights the need for predictive biomarkers to guide personalised therapy. Blood transcriptome profiling is a promising strategy for identifying gene signatures linked to treatment response, though prior studies have shown inconsistent results due to technical and biological heterogeneity. We performed a comprehensive meta-analysis of baseline blood transcriptome datasets from 8 independent RA cohorts to identify genes consistently upregulated in patients who responded to TNF-α inhibitors. This analysis identified a core set of 39 recurrent genes (the recurrent gene set ). To evaluate its predictive relevance, we trained machine learning models using 4 gene subsets: the recurrent set, the patent gene set derived from a biomarker patent, the top-ranked gene set based on Cohen's d effect size, and the full gene set. External validation was performed using an independent dataset. The recurrent gene set showed strong and consistent predictive performance across machine learning models. Notably, several genes overlapping with the patent and top-ranked sets were among the top contributors, supporting their potential value for future diagnostic applications. Our study demonstrates the feasibility of transcriptome-guided prediction of response to TNF-α inhibitors in RA. The integration of meta-analysis and machine learning provides a strong foundation for the development of precision diagnostic tools to support personalised treatment strategies in clinical practice.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎抗TNF治疗反应相关的血液基因特征：结合荟萃分析与机器学习方法
items.abstractZh: 肿瘤坏死因子α（TNF-α）抑制剂显著改善了类风湿关节炎（RA）的预后，但仍有30%至40%的患者反应不足。这凸显了预测性生物标志物指导个体化治疗的必要性。血液转录组分析是识别与治疗反应相关基因特征的有前景策略，然而先前研究因技术和生物学异质性而结果不一致。我们对来自8个独立RA队列的基线血液转录组数据集进行了全面的荟萃分析，以识别在TNF-α抑制剂应答者中一致上调的基因。该分析确定了39个核心重复基因（重复基因集）。为评估其预测相关性，我们使用4个基因子集训练机器学习模型：重复基因集、来自生物标志物专利的专利基因集、基于Cohen's d效应量的排名最高基因集以及全基因集。使用独立数据集进行外部验证。重复基因集在机器学习模型中表现出强大且一致的预测性能。值得注意的是，与专利基因集和排名最高基因集重叠的几个基因是主要贡献者，支持其未来诊断应用的潜在价值。我们的研究证明了转录组引导预测RA对TNF-α抑制剂反应的可行性。荟萃分析与机器学习的整合为开发精准诊断工具以支持临床实践中的个体化治疗策略奠定了坚实基础。

items.title: The impact of smoking and obesity on secukinumab effectiveness in psoriatic arthritis: real-world evidence from 1202 European patients.
items.abstract: In patients with psoriatic arthritis (PsA) initiating treatment with secukinumab, we investigated the impact of smoking and body mass index (BMI) on secukinumab retention rate at 12 months and the achievement of low Disease Activity Index for PsA in 28 joints (DAPSA28 ≤14) at 6 months. Patients with PsA initiating secukinumab with available data on smoking and BMI were included. Patients were categorised according to smoking status (never/former/current) and BMI (normal/overweight/obese) at treatment start. Kaplan-Meier curves and adjusted Cox and logistic regression analyses were performed to compare secukinumab retention and response rates, respectively. Additional regression analyses were performed with BMI as a continuous variable. We included 1202 patients. Retention rates in never/former/current smokers were 79%/73%/72% and in normal/overweight/obese 72%/77%/77%, respectively. Adjusted hazard ratios for treatment withdrawal were numerically higher in former (1.32; 95 % CI 1.00-1.75) and current smokers (1.27; 0.93-1.74), while remaining roughly similar across BMI (overweight: 0.90; 0.67-1.21, obese: 0.89; 0.66-1.21, per BMI unit: 1.00; 0.97-1.02). Response rates in never/former/current smokers were 56%/61%/49% and in normal/overweight/obese 57%/59%/52%, respectively. Adjusted odds ratio for achieving low DAPSA28 was numerically lower for current smokers (0.74; 0.47-1.15) but higher for former smokers (1.30; 0.87-1.94), whereas it was numerically lower in patients with obesity (0.74; 0.49-1.11) and lower with each increase in BMI unit (0.97; 0.94-1.00). In real-world patients with PsA, secukinumab retention tended to be lower in current and former smokers. No clear association between BMI and secukinumab effectiveness was observed.

items.titleZh: 吸烟和肥胖对银屑病关节炎患者司库奇尤单抗疗效的影响：来自1202例欧洲患者的真实世界证据
items.abstractZh: 在开始使用司库奇尤单抗治疗的银屑病关节炎（PsA）患者中，我们研究了吸烟和体重指数（BMI）对司库奇尤单抗12个月保留率以及6个月时达到低疾病活动指数（DAPSA28 ≤14）的影响。纳入开始使用司库奇尤单抗且有吸烟和BMI数据的PsA患者。根据治疗开始时的吸烟状态（从不/既往/当前）和BMI（正常/超重/肥胖）对患者进行分类。采用Kaplan-Meier曲线以及校正后的Cox和逻辑回归分析分别比较司库奇尤单抗的保留率和应答率。额外进行以BMI为连续变量的回归分析。共纳入1202例患者。从不/既往/当前吸烟者的保留率分别为79%/73%/72%，正常/超重/肥胖者分别为72%/77%/77%。治疗停药的校正风险比在既往吸烟者（1.32；95% CI 1.00-1.75）和当前吸烟者（1.27；0.93-1.74）中数值较高，而在不同BMI组间大致相似（超重：0.90；0.67-1.21，肥胖：0.89；0.66-1.21，每BMI单位：1.00；0.97-1.02）。从不/既往/当前吸烟者的应答率分别为56%/61%/49%，正常/超重/肥胖者分别为57%/59%/52%。达到低DAPSA28的校正比值比在当前吸烟者中数值较低（0.74；0.47-1.15），但在既往吸烟者中较高（1.30；0.87-1.94），而在肥胖患者中数值较低（0.74；0.49-1.11），且随每单位BMI增加而降低（0.97；0.94-1.00）。在真实世界的PsA患者中，当前和既往吸烟者的司库奇尤单抗保留率倾向于较低。未观察到BMI与司库奇尤单抗疗效之间的明确关联。

items.title: Recent developments in the use of biomarkers as diagnostic tools in patients with systemic lupus erythematosus: a narrative review.
items.abstract: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) is a heterogeneous systemic autoimmune disease with a complex a multifactorial pathophysiology. Due to difficulty recognising patients with SLE in an early stage, diagnostic delay is very common, which can result in the accumulation of organ damage. Some immunological signs, such as the presence of autoantibodies, have previously been shown to be present in patients with SLE, even before the onset of the first symptoms. This makes these immunological signs a prime target to improve the diagnostic process. In this article, we review recent studies investigating the use of biomarkers for diagnostics, including autoantibodies, other serum biomarkers, biomarkers in other bodily materials, circulating RNAs, and gene expression profiles. We discuss their place in the pathophysiology of SLE and their potential to improve and expedite the diagnostic process for patients with SLE.

items.titleZh: 生物标志物作为系统性红斑狼疮患者诊断工具的最新进展：一项叙述性综述
items.abstractZh: 系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）是一种异质性系统性自身免疫性疾病，具有复杂且多因素的病理生理学。由于早期识别SLE患者存在困难，诊断延迟非常常见，这可能导致器官损伤的累积。一些免疫学标志，如自身抗体的存在，先前已被证明在SLE患者中出现，甚至在第一症状出现之前。这使得这些免疫学标志成为改善诊断过程的主要目标。在本文中，我们回顾了近期研究，这些研究探讨了生物标志物在诊断中的应用，包括自身抗体、其他血清生物标志物、其他体液中的生物标志物、循环RNA和基因表达谱。我们讨论了它们在SLE病理生理学中的地位，以及它们改善和加快SLE患者诊断过程的潜力。

items.titleZh: HLA-DRB1*15:01和HLA-DRB1*11与系统性幼年特发性关节炎相关巨噬细胞活化综合征及其他继发性噬血细胞性淋巴组织细胞增多症无关联。

items.title: Antirheumatic medication use among pregnant women with rheumatoid arthritis: a Norwegian nationwide drug utilisation study.
items.abstract: Managing rheumatoid arthritis (RA) during pregnancy requires balancing maternal health and foetal safety. This study examined the prevalence, temporal trends, utilisation patterns, and concurrent use of antirheumatic medications from preconception through the postpartum period. We conducted a nationwide study using Norwegian registry data (2006-2018), linking the medical birth registry with prescription and primary care records. Pregnant women with RA were identified through diagnostic codes. Dispensed prescriptions were evaluated from 9 months before the last menstrual period to 9 months after delivery. Multitrajectory models identified distinct patterns of antirheumatic medication use over time. Of 769,524 pregnancies, 3732 (0.5%) occurred in women with RA. In the period around pregnancy, 52.9% used non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs (NSAIDs), 33.6% glucocorticoids, 17.7% pregnancy-compatible conventional synthetic disease-modifying antirheumatic drugs (csDMARDs), 14.8% pregnancy-contraindicated csDMARDs, and 21.6% tumour necrosis factor (TNF) inhibitors. Medication use declined from 61.3% preconceptionally to 37.6%, 22.1%, and 18.9% in the first, second, and third trimesters, respectively, then increased to 53.0% postpartum. From 2008 to 2018, antirheumatic medication use increased preconceptionally (59.8%-65.7%), during pregnancy (30.6%-49.5%), and postpartum (45.1%-54.1%), mainly due to increased TNF inhibitor use. Three distinct medication use patterns emerged: (i) NSAID-dominant use prepregnancy, (ii) glucocorticoid plus pregnancy-compatible csDMARD use continuing into pregnancy; and (iii) pregnancy-contraindicated csDMARD interrupters, mostly discontinuing during pregnancy and restarting postpartum. Although antirheumatic medication use increased over time, most women discontinued treatment during pregnancy and resumed it after childbirth. The 3 distinct usage patterns highlight the need for individualised counselling and close monitoring to optimise disease management.

items.title: Understanding the transition from psoriasis to psoriatic arthritis: the role of targeted therapy.
items.abstract: Most individuals who develop psoriatic arthritis (PsA) first present with psoriasis (PsC), often years before musculoskeletal symptoms emerge. Progression from PsC to PsA is multifactorial, shaped by genetic and environmental influences, and may involve at-risk stages and subclinical stages before culminating in clinically overt arthritis. Consistently identified risk factors include greater PsC severity, nail involvement, arthralgia, and elevated body mass index. In this Viewpoint, we review and critically appraise current evidence on PsC-to-PsA transition, focusing on how the mechanism of action of biologic disease-modifying antirheumatic drugs may influence this trajectory. Emerging data suggest that therapies targeting the interleukin (IL)-23/IL-17 axis may provide greater protection against PsA development than tumour necrosis factor inhibitors, underscoring the central role of this pathway in psoriatic disease pathogenesis. However, existing studies are limited by confounding, protopathic bias, and heterogeneous cohorts. By integrating mechanistic insights with clinical data, we emphasise the urgent need for rigorously designed multinational randomised controlled trials to determine whether, and how, biologic therapy can modify the natural history of psoriatic disease.

items.titleZh: 理解从银屑病到银屑病关节炎的转变：靶向治疗的作用
items.abstractZh: 大多数发展为银屑病关节炎（PsA）的个体首先表现为银屑病（PsC），通常肌肉骨骼症状出现前数年。从PsC到PsA的进展是多因素的，受遗传和环境因素影响，可能涉及风险阶段和亚临床阶段，最终发展为临床明显的关节炎。一致识别的风险因素包括更严重的PsC、指甲受累、关节痛和体重指数升高。在本观点中，我们回顾并批判性评估当前关于PsC到PsA转变的证据，重点关注生物疾病修饰抗风湿药物的作用机制如何影响这一轨迹。新兴数据表明，靶向白细胞介素（IL）-23/IL-17轴的疗法可能比肿瘤坏死因子抑制剂提供更好的预防PsA发展的保护，强调了该通路在银屑病疾病发病机制中的核心作用。然而，现有研究受限于混杂因素、原发偏倚和异质性队列。通过整合机制见解与临床数据，我们强调迫切需要设计严谨的多国随机对照试验，以确定生物疗法是否以及如何改变银屑病疾病的自然史。

items.title: Low value of routine serological screening for hepatitis B in patients with rheumatoid arthritis starting rituximab therapy in a nonendemic region.
items.abstract: Rituximab (RTX) is an effective and safe treatment for rheumatoid arthritis (RA), but is associated with an increased risk of reactivation of hepatitis B virus (HBV) infection. Therefore, (inter)national guidelines recommend HBV screening prior to initiation of RTX treatment. However, the incidence of HBV in RA patients in nonendemic areas is expected to be very low, with known suboptimal screening adherence. This study aims to assess the added diagnostic value of routine serological HBV screening in RA patients initiating RTX. This retrospective single-centre cohort study included all patients with a clinical diagnosis of RA intending to initiate RTX between April 2012 and April 2024. Data on patient and disease characteristics, HBV screening results, and additional laboratory results were collected. Adherence to HBV screening, proportion of positive test results (hepatitis B surface antigen or core antibody positive), and incidence of HBV reactivation were assessed. Of 975 included patients, 270 (28 %) were serologically screened for HBV. Six of those (2.2 %) had a positive screening result, of whom 3 eventually did not receive RTX. All 6 had a known HBV history or risk factor. No active HBV infections were observed after initiating RTX (mean follow-up 6.97 years), regardless of screening. Routine serological HBV screening identified very few previously unrecognised infections, and-in spite of screening adherence being low-no HBV reactivations occurred. Routine serological HBV screening, therefore, seems redundant in a low-risk population and should be reserved for patients with known risk factors.

items.titleZh: 在非流行区开始利妥昔单抗治疗的类风湿关节炎患者中常规血清学乙肝筛查价值低
items.abstractZh: 利妥昔单抗（RTX）是类风湿关节炎（RA）有效且安全的治疗方法，但与乙型肝炎病毒（HBV）感染再激活风险增加相关。因此，（国际）国家指南建议在开始RTX治疗前进行HBV筛查。然而，在非流行区RA患者中HBV的发病率预计非常低，且已知筛查依从性不佳。本研究旨在评估常规血清学HBV筛查对开始RTX治疗的RA患者的附加诊断价值。这项回顾性单中心队列研究纳入了2012年4月至2024年4月期间所有临床诊断为RA并计划开始RTX的患者。收集了患者和疾病特征、HBV筛查结果以及额外实验室结果的数据。评估了HBV筛查依从性、阳性检测结果（乙肝表面抗原或核心抗体阳性）比例以及HBV再激活发生率。在975名纳入患者中，270名（28%）接受了血清学HBV筛查。其中6名（2.2%）筛查结果阳性，其中3名最终未接受RTX。所有6名患者均有已知的HBV病史或危险因素。开始RTX后（平均随访6.97年），无论是否筛查，均未观察到活动性HBV感染。因此，常规血清学HBV筛查识别出的既往未识别感染极少，并且尽管筛查依从性低，但未发生HBV再激活。因此，在低风险人群中常规血清学HBV筛查似乎多余，应仅用于有已知危险因素的患者。

items.title: The treatment landscape in axial spondyloarthritis-do we need new therapies?
items.abstract: Despite major therapeutic advances, many patients with axial spondyloarthritis (axSpA) fail to achieve remission or even low disease activity with currently available advanced therapies. This highlights an urgent need to understand why treatment responses remain suboptimal and how management can be improved. Several mechanisms contribute to persistent symptoms. Misdiagnosis and overdiagnosis remain frequent, often due to nonspecific imaging findings being misattributed to axSpA. Among correctly diagnosed patients, a substantial proportion experience pain not directly driven by inflammation. Nociplastic pain-frequently associated with fatigue, anxiety, depression, and sleep disturbances-is the predominant mechanism, while neuropathic pain is less common. These patients do not benefit from escalation of anti-inflammatory therapy but instead require tailored approaches addressing nociplastic pain, including structured exercise, cognitive-behavioural therapy, and pharmacological agents. However, robust clinical trial data in axSpA populations are lacking, and studies evaluating these interventions as add-on strategies are urgently needed. A smaller but clinically important subset of patients demonstrates true treatment-refractory (TR) axSpA, with objective inflammation persisting despite multiple biologic or targeted synthetic disease-modifying antirheumatic drugs. Novel therapeutic approaches under investigation include dual-targeted therapy with complementary mechanisms, selective depletion of pathogenic T cells, modulation of the HLA-B27 immunopeptidome through endoplasmic reticulum aminopeptidase 1/2 inhibition, and blockade of macrophage migration inhibitory factor. The primary challenge in axSpA today-besides the problem of the correct diagnosis-is to optimise the use of existing therapies for pain not related to inflammation, while simultaneously developing innovative options for TR disease. Together, these efforts will determine whether remission can become an attainable goal for all patients.

items.titleZh: 中轴型脊柱关节炎的治疗格局——我们需要新的疗法吗？
items.abstractZh: 尽管治疗取得了重大进展，许多中轴型脊柱关节炎（axSpA）患者在使用当前可用的先进疗法后仍未能达到缓解甚至低疾病活动度。这凸显了理解治疗反应为何仍不理想以及如何改善管理的迫切需求。多种机制导致持续症状。误诊和过度诊断仍然常见，通常是由于非特异性影像学发现被错误归因于axSpA。在正确诊断的患者中，相当一部分人经历的疼痛并非直接由炎症驱动。伤害可塑性疼痛——常伴有疲劳、焦虑、抑郁和睡眠障碍——是主要机制，而神经病理性疼痛较少见。这些患者不会从抗炎治疗的升级中获益，而是需要针对伤害可塑性疼痛的定制方法，包括结构化运动、认知行为疗法和药物。然而，在axSpA人群中缺乏强有力的临床试验数据，迫切需要评估这些干预措施作为附加策略的研究。一个较小但临床重要的亚组患者表现出真正的难治性（TR）axSpA，尽管使用了多种生物制剂或靶向合成改善病情抗风湿药，客观炎症仍持续存在。正在研究的新型治疗方法包括具有互补机制的双靶向治疗、选择性清除致病性T细胞、通过内质网氨基肽酶1/2抑制调节HLA-B27免疫肽组，以及阻断巨噬细胞迁移抑制因子。如今axSpA的主要挑战——除了正确诊断的问题——是优化现有疗法用于非炎症相关疼痛，同时为TR疾病开发创新选择。这些努力将共同决定缓解是否能成为所有患者可实现的目标。

items.title: Racial and ethnic representation in systemic sclerosis clinical trials: a 25-year analysis of ClinicalTrials.gov (1999-2025).
items.abstract: This study aimed to quantify reporting of race and ethnicity in systemic sclerosis (SSc) clinical trials, characterise geographic distribution, and assess participant representation relative to US population benchmarks. We conducted a cross-sectional analysis of registered SSc trials with enrolment data. Of 699 trials screened, 95 met initial criteria; after excluding 21 terminated and 4 non-SSc studies, 70 completed trials (n = 4956 participants) were analysed. We summarised the prevalence of race/ethnicity reporting and calculated race/ethnicity distributions among participants with available data. US Census estimates were used for contextual comparison. Trials were also grouped by recruiting continent. Among 70 trials, 39 (55.7%) reported race and 26 (37.1%) reported ethnicity; 25 reported both, while 30 (42.9%) reported neither. Participant-level data were available for 3161 individuals for race (60.0% of all enrollees) and 2255 for ethnicity (47.1%). Among those with race reported, 78.5% were White (n = 2482), 12.7% Asian (n = 400), 4.9% Black or African American (n = 155), 1.4% multiracial (n = 45), 0.6% American Indian/Alaska Native (n = 18), and 0.3% Native Hawaiian/Other Pacific Islander (n = 8); 1.7% were unknown/unreported (n = 53). Of participants with ethnicity data (n = 2335), 10.9% were Hispanic/Latino, 86.6% not Hispanic/Latino, and 2.5% unknown/unreported. Trial activity was concentrated in North America (39.2%) and Europe (36.3%), with additional activity in Asia (16.6%); South America, Oceania, and Africa contributed smaller shares. Race/ethnicity reporting in SSc trials is incomplete, and available data reveal disproportionate underenrolment of Black and Hispanic/Latino participants relative to US population benchmarks. Standardised reporting and intentional, equity-focused recruitment are needed to enhance representativeness and interpretability of SSc trial findings.

items.title: Clinical outcomes of patients with diffuse large B-cell lymphoma and concomitant rheumatoid arthritis: a nationwide Danish register-based cohort study.
items.abstract: This register-based cohort study aimed to investigate clinical cancer outcomes in patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA) who develop diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL) compared with those in patients without RA but with DLBCL. The study included all patients with RA and DLBCL aged ≥18 years in the Danish National Lymphoma Registry who received first-line treatment between January 1, 2006, and May 21, 2022. RA diagnoses (exposure) and patients without RA (comparator) at the time of DLBCL diagnosis were identified through linkage with the Danish Rheumatology Quality Register and the Danish National Patient Registry. Patients were followed up from DLBCL treatment initiation until emigration, death, outcomes of interest, or May 21, 2022. Hazard ratios (HRs) and 95% CIs were estimated for outcomes including overall survival (OS), progression-free survival (PFS), and hospital admissions. The final study cohort included 136 patients with RA and 5372 without RA. Adjusted HRs for OS and PFS in patients with RA were 1.02 (95% CI, 0.74-1.39) and 0.86 (95% CI, 0.65-1.14), respectively, compared with those of patients without RA. Two-year OS was 81.9% in patients with RA and 77.8% in those without RA, with 2-year PFS of 72.6% and 72.4%, respectively. For other outcomes, HRs were <1 for patients with RA, with a statistically significant reduction in hospital admissions: 0.56 (95% CI, 0.44-0.72) in adjusted calculations. In conclusion, patients with RA and DLBCL did not experience worse survival outcomes or increased hospitalisation rate during therapy.

items.titleZh: 弥漫大B细胞淋巴瘤合并类风湿关节炎患者的临床结局：一项基于丹麦全国登记数据库的队列研究
items.abstractZh: 这项基于登记数据库的队列研究旨在探讨类风湿关节炎（RA）患者发生弥漫大B细胞淋巴瘤（DLBCL）后的临床癌症结局，并与无RA的DLBCL患者进行比较。研究纳入丹麦国家淋巴瘤登记数据库中所有年龄≥18岁、在2006年1月1日至2022年5月21日期间接受一线治疗的RA合并DLBCL患者。通过丹麦风湿病质量登记库和丹麦国家患者登记库的关联，确定DLBCL诊断时的RA患者（暴露组）和无RA患者（对照组）。患者从DLBCL治疗开始随访至移民、死亡、发生结局事件或2022年5月21日。评估总生存期（OS）、无进展生存期（PFS）和住院等结局的风险比（HR）及95%置信区间（CI）。最终研究队列包括136例RA患者和5372例无RA患者。与无RA患者相比，RA患者的OS和PFS调整后HR分别为1.02（95% CI, 0.74-1.39）和0.86（95% CI, 0.65-1.14）。RA患者2年OS为81.9%，无RA患者为77.8%；2年PFS分别为72.6%和72.4%。对于其他结局，RA患者的HR均<1，其中住院率显著降低：调整后HR为0.56（95% CI, 0.44-0.72）。结论：RA合并DLBCL患者在治疗期间并未出现更差的生存结局或住院率增加。

items.title: Patients' coping strategies in the first 2 years of rheumatoid arthritis: a qualitative study.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA) is a chronic disease that requires lifelong medication and self-management. Few studies have explored the coping strategies patients use to make life manageable after an RA diagnosis, and how these strategies function in the adaptive process of living with RA. The aim was to describe coping strategies patients with RA use to manage everyday life during the first 2 years after diagnosis. A purposeful sample of 22 patients, each with a disease duration of 12 to 20 months, participated in interviews conducted either in focus groups or individually. The study used an abductive qualitative content analysis combining inductive identification of coping strategies with deductive categorisation. The analysis revealed various coping strategies and their functions, which were categorised into 10 subcategories and 3 categories. They represented the adaptive processes used by patients to coordinate actions and contingencies within their environment, rely on available social resources, and align preferences with available options. During the early years with RA and modern medical care, patients expressed the need to use various coping strategies to manage everyday life. The strategies varied depending on the patient's life situation and context and ranged from making a mental effort, to accepting and adjusting their mindset, to planning and finding solutions.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎患者确诊后前两年的应对策略：一项定性研究
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎（RA）是一种需要终身用药和自我管理的慢性疾病。很少有研究探讨患者在确诊RA后为使生活可控而使用的应对策略，以及这些策略在适应RA生活过程中的作用。本研究旨在描述RA患者在确诊后前两年内用于管理日常生活的应对策略。采用目的性抽样，选取22名病程为12至20个月的患者，通过焦点小组或个人访谈进行数据收集。研究采用溯因定性内容分析法，结合归纳识别应对策略与演绎分类。分析揭示了多种应对策略及其功能，并将其归类为10个亚类和3个类别。这些策略代表了患者用于协调环境中的行动与偶发事件、依赖可用社会资源以及将偏好与可用选项对齐的适应过程。在RA早期和现代医疗条件下，患者表示需要使用多种应对策略来管理日常生活。策略因患者的生活状况和背景而异，范围从心理努力、接受和调整心态，到计划和寻找解决方案。

items.title: A case of adult-onset Still disease complicated by macrophage activation syndrome and toxic epidermal necrolysis.
items.abstract: A 56-year-old woman with 1-year recurrent fever, rash, joint swelling (acute exacerbation) was diagnosed with adult-onset Still disease (AOSD) per 1992 Yamaguchi criteria. She initially improved with methylprednisolone, tocilizumab, methotrexate, and iguratimod but relapsed after discontinuing methylprednisolone. Twenty-four hours after first Re Du Ning injection, she developed progressive rash (extensive polymorphic erythema, bullae, and >30% body surface epidermal detachment), high fever, organ impairment, and coagulopathy and was diagnosed with AOSD complicated by macrophage activation syndrome (2004 haemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis guidelines), toxic epidermal necrolysis, myocardial injury, hepatic impairment, and disseminated intravascular coagulation. Treatment included dexamethasone, methylprednisolone, plasma exchange, cyclosporine, anakinra, ganciclovir, voriconazole, intravenous immunoglobulin, and supportive care, leading to marked improvement in lesions. This case highlights rare AOSD complications and anakinra's efficacy.
